ogTitle: Fountain vs Fowlers Bay: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Fountain and Fowlers Bay.
heading: Fountain vs Fowlers Bay — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Fountain, South Australia and Fowlers Bay, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Fountain has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Fowlers Bay (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Fountain or Fowlers Bay safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Fountain has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Fowlers Bay scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Fountain scores 30/100 for bushfire risk. Fowlers Bay scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Fountain or Fowlers Bay?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Fountain has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
